items.title: 55-year-old Home Depot rival chain store closes, no bankruptcy
items.description: When consumers have an immediate hardware need, such as a fluorescent light tube for the kitchen, various fasteners, or adhesives for a repair, a quick trip to the local retailer can be the most convenient solution. Most communities have an independent hardware store or an Ace Hardware or True ...

items.title: Retail Sector Earnings in Focus
items.description: While Walmart faced some post-earnings pressure, the company is still enjoying strong momentum in its business, with growth in ecommerce and 'adjacent' new businesses like advertising, marketplace, and third-party fulfillment driving results.

items.title: Nvidia earnings live: Nvidia stock pops as earnings beat, guidance stifles some AI concerns
items.description: The S&P 500 was on track for double-digit earnings growth, with more than half of companies having reported Q4 results so far.

items.title: Housing Stocks Hit Hard by Gloomy Outlooks, Trump’s Snub
items.description: The declines were led by Green Brick Partners Inc., Lennar Corp., Champion Homes Inc., Dream Finders Homes Inc., Installed Building Products Inc., DR Horton Inc. and TopBuild Corp. Mortgage-exposed companies like Rocket Cos Inc. fell as well.  Lowe’s forecast full-year sales that fell short of expectations, in a sign the housing market will remain lackluster in the near term, following close on the heels of cautionary comments from Home Depot Inc. that macroeconomic challenges remain.

items.title: Home Depot Shares Tank On Outlook, Analysts Remain Bullish
items.description: Home Depot stock slides despite strong Q4 results. Analysts raise price targets due to solid performance & stable housing market.
